about.title: About us
about.desc: B2Work was born from the idea that finding flexible work should be simple, safe and fast. We connect professionals and employers for occasional opportunities throughout Italy.
about.mission_desc: To create the leading platform in Italy for occasional and freelance work, where every professional can find opportunities suited to their skills and every company can find the right talent at the right time.
about.value1_desc: Verified profiles and protected payments for every collaboration.
about.value2_desc: Find the right professional in hours, not weeks.
about.value3_desc: We believe in the value of flexible work and the dignity of every worker.
about.value4_desc: A network of professionals who support and grow together.
about.value5_desc: Available everywhere, on every device, for everyone.
about.value6_desc: Intelligent matching between job supply and demand.
about.team_desc: A young and passionate team based in Milan, dedicated to transforming the world of flexible work.
about.cta_desc: Start discovering opportunities on B2Work today.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about B2Work.
faq.q1: How do I find a professional?
faq.a1: Go to the "Search" section and filter by category, city or role. You can contact professionals directly from their profile.
faq.q2: How do I publish a job ad?
faq.a2: Click on "Publish" in the navigation bar, fill in the form with all job details and confirm the publication.
faq.a3: Yes, each profile shows the average rating and reviews received from previous employers.
faq.q4: How much does it cost to publish an ad?
faq.a4: Publishing ads is free during the platform's launch phase.
faq.q5: How do I register as a professional?
faq.a5: Create an account, complete your profile with skills, experience and availability, and start applying for ads.
faq.q6: How do I apply for a job?
faq.a6: On the ad detail page, click "Apply" and select your preferred date. The employer will receive your application.
faq.q7: Can I set my own rates?
faq.a7: Yes, you can set your rates in your profile. For each ad the price is set by the employer, but you can always negotiate.
faq.a8: Payments are managed securely through the platform. Payment is held until the job is completed.
faq.a9: Payment is released within 24-48 hours of the employer confirming job completion.
faq.a10: We accept credit/debit cards and bank transfers. We're working on adding more methods.
faq.q11: How can I edit my profile?
faq.a11: Go to the Dashboard and click "Edit profile" to update your information, photos and skills.
faq.a12: Yes, we use SSL encryption and follow best security practices to protect your personal data.
faq.a13: Yes, you can request account deletion by contacting support. All your data will be deleted.
